name: Szechwan Beef Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 small red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 can whole baby corn, (15 ounces), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef steak lengthwise in half and then crosswise into 1/8-inch thick strips.
2. In a medium bowl, combine marinade ingredients; add beef, tossing to coat.
3. Heat 2 teaspoons sesame oil over medium-high heat until hot in a large skillet.
4. Add garlic, ginger, and crushed red pepper; cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add bell pepper and corn; stir-fry for 1-1/2 minutes.
6. Add pea pods; stir-fry for 30 seconds. Remove vegetables from the skillet.
7. Add beef (in portions of about half) to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes, or until the outside surface is no longer pink.
8. Return the vegetables and beef to the skillet and heat through.
Makes 4 servings
